prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第21名，近年排名稳定在20–23名区间，属全国顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及学术不端与师德师风事件（生科院院长论文造假、多名教师被举报等），可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第36（较热），短视频曝光量中等。历史投档异常方面，2022年河南理科曾出现严重断档（580+分），但2023年后已恢复；拥有14个A-及以上学科，其中化学、工商管理、应用经济学、数学为A+；世界史、中国史、中国语言文学、政治学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、统计学、马克思主义理论为A；环境科学与工程为A-。学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业持续高热推荐；本省2026年考生总数约120万（较2025年大幅增加），竞争整体加剧；南开大学位于天津，非本省高校；河南省为生源大省，跨省报考竞争激烈。该校在河南招生计划持续扩招，2026年物理类计划128人，较2025年增加32人，但考生总数同步增长。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次缓慢后移趋势（近3年累计后移约424名）、2026年大幅扩招33.3%（计划96→128人）导致竞争加剧、本省考生总数增加及声誉负面事件轻微抑制，在2025年基准3838名基础上。预计2026年最低位次约4606名，区间4106–5106名。

- 理科试验班（数学与大数据）（含数学与应用数学、统计学）
- 工科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（含计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术）。

- 金融学类（含金融学、保险学、精算学）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4106–5106名内，建议以二档专业为主（工科试验班信息类、金融学类），一档拔尖班/数学大数据班可冲刺，三档物理光电/物质科学类保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<4106名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1945 → 23098 → 3414 → 3608 → 3838. In 2022, there was a severe ranking gap (23098), which recovered from 2023 and stabilized in the 3400–3800 range, with a cumulative backward shift of about 424 places over the past three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3838; enrollment plans for science (physics category) from 2021 to 2025 were 60 → 58 → 64 → 67 → 96, showing continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 128 students, a 33.3% increase from 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 20–23 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents (paper fraud by the dean of the School of Life Sciences, multiple teachers reported, etc.), which may slightly suppress application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a severe ranking gap in Henan science in 2022 (580+ points), but it has recovered since 2023; it has 14 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Chemistry, Business Administration, Applied Economics, and Mathematics; A in World History, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Political Science, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Statistics, and Marxist Theory; A- in Environmental Science and Engineering. The strong disciplinary strength strongly attracts applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other popular science majors continue to be highly recommended; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from 2025), intensifying overall competition; Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a provincial university; Henan is a major source province, with fierce cross-provincial application competition. The university's enrollment plan in Henan continues to expand, with 128 physics category students planned for 2026, an increase of 32 from 2025, but the total number of candidates is also growing simultaneously.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the slow backward trend of historical rankings (cumulative backward shift of about 424 places over the past three years), the significant 33.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 (plan from 96 to 128 students) leading to intensified competition, the increase in the total number of candidates in the province, and the slight suppression from negative reputation events, on the basis of the 2025 baseline of 3838, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be approximately 4606, with a range of 4106–5106.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Science Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (including Physics, Chemistry, Biological Sciences)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (including Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (including Computer Science, Information Security, Automation, etc.)
- Finance (including Finance, Insurance, Actuarial Science)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) (including Physics, Optoelectronics, Electronics, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science and Sustainable Development) (including Chemistry, Biology, Environment, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite) (including Intelligent Medical Engineering, New Energy, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4106–5106, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Engineering Experimental Class Information, Finance), with Tier 1 Top Talent Classes/Mathematics and Big Data as reach options, and Tier 3 Physics Optoelectronics/Material Science as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4106), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
